---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
---

::: {.home-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
Exercise Scientist
:::

# Velu Immonen.

::: {.tagline}
PhD student researching the relationship between muscle size and strength at Southampton Solent University.
:::

::: {.home-ctas}
[Selected Works](works.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Blog](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-outline}
[GitHub](https://github.com/veluimmonen){.btn .btn-outline}
:::
:::

::: {.home-section}
::: {.section-label}
Recent writing
:::

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

:::
